title: Xtra Crisp Vietnamese Serrano Ham Noodles
description: A citrusy and cozy Vietnamese dish featuring serrano ham and render-fat, with anti-inflammatory friendly ingredients.
instructions: Cook the rice noodles according to package instructions and set aside.
In a large skillet, heat the render-fat over medium heat.
Add the thinly sliced Serrano ham to the skillet and cook until crispy.
Remove the ham from the skillet and set aside.
In the same skillet, add the grated ginger and cook for 1 minute.
Add the turmeric, salt, and black pepper to the skillet and cook for 1 minute.
Add the cooked noodles to the skillet and stir to combine with the spice mixture.
Return the crispy Serrano ham to the skillet and stir to combine with the noodles.
Squeeze the fresh lime juice over the top of the noodles and stir to combine.
Garnish with chopped fresh cilantro and serve hot.
